title: Spicy Italian Sausage Pilaf
description: A hearty Italian-inspired pilaf dish flavored with yaki sauce and rich sausage. Serve with a side of steamed ki vegetables.

ingredients.name: Italian Sausage
ingredients.notes: Choose a spicy sausage for added flavor

ingredients.name: Pilaf
ingredients.notes: Use a gluten-free pilaf mix or make your own with rice and spices

ingredients.name: Yaki Sauce
ingredients.notes: Adjust to taste for level of spiciness

ingredients.name: Ki
ingredients.notes: Peel and chop for a side dish or add to the pilaf

ingredients.name: Ethiopian Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: Add a pinch of spice for extra depth

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: For sautéing the sausage and pilaf

ingredients.name: Salt and Pepper
ingredients.notes: Season the pilaf and sausage to taste

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Italian sausage and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the pilaf mix to the skillet and stir to combine with the sausage.
Add the yaki sauce and Ethiopian spice blend to the pilaf and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the pilaf is lightly toasted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the pilaf to a serving dish and top with chopped ki.
Optional: add additional spices or herbs to taste.
